blocks.text: A child’s immune system is driven by their early exposure to a wide variety of early microbes. Dirt for Children brings every child a wide range of inputs to help them grow up healthy and strong.

Yes. This is literally just selling dirt to parents for their children. There is some scientific veracity to the idea that a widely seeded microbiome is good for kids, and suggestions/ideas that the overly sterile modern environments contribute to allergies and other maladies.

items.text: Having parents gather/mail in local dirt (for a discount on product)
Testing it all for Lead/Chrome etc
Having some measurement of the probiotic content

blocks.text: The idea of shipping a little spice shaker of dirt to add to meals and play places really tickles my fancy.

items.text: There is a growing body of evidence that too sterile of an environment can lead to allergies and other immune related issues
I found this supplement in the wild. It is a dropper bottle full of salt water sold for $30. It haunts me. Oxygen naturally dissolves in water, this is literally just saline.
